text: Unless the board changes the fiscal year, the district’s fiscal year ends on September 30.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 174. Commuter Rail Districts
##### § 174.251 — Fiscal Year

Unless the board changes the fiscal year, the district’s fiscal year ends on September 30.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: Unless the board changes the fiscal year, the district’s fiscal year ends on September 30.
